prompt:
Scene:
A square upscale retail fitting room with a large mirror, warm overhead lighting, pale wood floor, and clean editorial styling.

Subject:
A fictional adult model stands in front of the mirror while the reflection shows the same identity and pose wearing an alternate outfit preview. The face, hair, skin tone, body proportions, and posture must match between real figure and mirror reflection; only the outfit preview differs.

Important details:
Photorealistic fitting room environment, realistic mirror reflection, coherent body alignment, precise identity preservation, believable garment drape, clean composition, no interface overlays or readable labels.

Use case:
Independent virtual try-on study for testing mirror-based comparison and identity preservation in a retail context.

Constraints:
One fictional model and one mirror reflection only, same identity in both, change only clothing in the reflection preview, no readable text, no logos, no watermark, no extra people, no distorted reflection, preserve exact 1:1 aspect ratio.
title: Retail Mirror Comparison
description: A fitting room mirror compares one fictional model identity across two outfits.

generation.runner_notes: Independent prompted image; no reference URL required.

en.title: Retail Mirror Comparison
en.description: A fitting room mirror compares one fictional model identity across two outfits.
